prompt: Create a cinematic vertical 35mm street photography image of a young man performing a dramatic wheelie on a red and black sport motorcycle in the middle of a busy urban street. The motorcycle is the main focus, shot from a low front angle with the front wheel lifted high toward the camera and the rear wheel still on the asphalt. The rider wears a black leather jacket over a white t-shirt, a gold chain necklace, ripped black jeans, and black boots, gripping the handlebars with a confident posture. The sport bike has an aggressive red fairing with black accents, bright headlights, a tinted windscreen, angular mirrors, thick front tire, exposed brake disc, and glossy bodywork. Add small bright sparks spraying from the lower right side near the rear wheel or footpeg as it scrapes the road. Set the scene on a city street lined with mid-rise buildings, storefronts, pedestrians gathered along the sidewalk, and cars in the background, all softly blurred with shallow depth of field. Use warm late-afternoon natural light, teal-and-orange cinematic color grading, realistic motion energy, detailed asphalt texture, subtle film grain, and a professional 35mm lens look. Composition should be portrait orientation, centered on the motorcycle and rider, with no readable text, no logos, and no extra vehicles blocking the subject.
